title: adenia refracta
intro: Adenia refracta, also known as the African potato, is a type of vining plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its edible tubers. The medicinal properties of Adenia refracta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of malaria and other infectious diseases. The plant's tubers can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
